knockout_proof.element: Zero competitors claim root flaw diagnosis
knockout_proof.rationale: Of 9 competitors analyzed, not one claims to identify a golfer's single root swing flaw. The diagnosis positioning is entirely uncontested.

diagnosis.claim: Know your ONE root swing flaw

identity.claim: Be one of the first 1,000 founders

promise_ceiling.strategy: Lead with DIAGNOSIS + SYSTEM + IDENTITY. Promise CLARITY, not IMPROVEMENT.

critical_gaps.description: No PG1 customer testimonials (zero beta user stories with names/results)
critical_gaps.action: Collect from early beta testers and Founders within first 30 days

critical_gaps.description: 6 coaches unnamed — no names, bios, or credentials
critical_gaps.action: Populate names, bios, credentials before page goes live

critical_gaps.description: No specific handicap improvement data from beta users
critical_gaps.action: Track from Day 1, publish at 90 days

critical_gaps.description: No before/after demonstration of the SwingScan diagnosis process
critical_gaps.action: Create walkthrough demo video before launch

top_10_elements.element: Zero competitors claim root flaw diagnosis

discovery_highlights.finding: 70% of golfers who take lessons don't improve
AI outperforms dermatologists in 63% of studies
AI scored 4.08 vs human coaches 4.42; AI wins comprehensiveness

downstream_handoffs.skill_03_core_message: Use knockout proof (MECH-01), promise ceiling constraints, and Stage 3-4 strategy
downstream_handoffs.skill_04_vsl: Use gradualization sequence and objection-proof mapping for script structure
downstream_handoffs.skill_05_ecomm: Use category rankings and C.P.B. framework for feature sections
downstream_handoffs.skill_06_upsells: Use risk reversal elements and value comparison data
downstream_handoffs.skill_18_email: Use discovery data (DISC-05, DISC-08) for belief-building sequences
